leadText: Friend Guard (Japanese: フレンドガード Friend Guard) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Friend Guard reduces the damage that other allied Pokémon receive from attacks (from any Pokémon) by 25%. It does not reduce the damage dealt by moves that deal direct damage . It does not affect the Pokémon with the Ability itself. If multiple of a Pokémon's allies have Friend Guard, Friend Guard stacks multiplicatively. For example, if both of a Pokémon's allies have Friend Guard in a Triple Battle , the damage that that Pokémon receives is multiplied by 9/16 (56.25%), which is a damage reduction of 43.75%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Friend Guard has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
